questionHtml: Outline, with a reason, another property that could be monitored to measure the rate of this reaction.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1
colour  [✔]

Br2/reactant is coloured «Br– (aq)/product is not»  [✔]

Note: Do not accept “changes in temperature” or “number of bubbles”.

 

ALTERNATIVE 2
conductivity  [✔]

greater/increased concentration of ions in products  [✔]

 

ALTERNATIVE 3
mass/pressure  [✔]

gas is evolved/produced  [✔]

Note: Do not accept “mass of products is less than mass of reactants”.


ALTERNATIVE 4
pH  [✔]

methanoic acid is weak AND HBr is strong
OR
increase in [H+]  [✔]

meta.title: Outline, with a reason, another property that could be monitored to measure the rate of this reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
